Bus Timings

84 Bus Schedule Jumeirah Beach Residence to Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate Route Overview

August 29, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Known for its vibrant atmosphere, JBR is a favorite among both tourists and locals. The station provides easy access to the famous JBR Beach, a long stretch of sand lined with cafes, restaurants, and shops.

Another place that is also frequently visited by many people is Al Quoz district. The area is well-equipped with essential amenities, including supermarkets, pharmacies, and eateries, catering to the daily needs of residents. And both of places connected by 84 bus, The 84 bus route runs between Jumeirah Beach Residence (JBR) Station 2 and Quoz, Al Khail Gate 1. Contents

84 Bus Timings

The 84 bus operates daily offering convenient and regular service throughout the week. The first bus depart at 06.00 AM and the last bus depart at 23.00 PM, and here is the detail of 84 bus timings or schedule.

From Jumeirah Beach Residence From Al Quoz, Al Khail Gate
05:56 07:19
06:15 07:38
06:30 07:53
06:45 08:08
07:00 08:23
07:18 08:41
07:38 09:01
07:58 09:21
08:20 09:43
08:42 10:05
08:58 10:21
09:13 10:36
09:28 10:51
09:41 11:04
09:56 11:19
10:10 11:33
10:26 11:49
10:55 12:18
11:30 12:53
11:56 13:19
12:20 13:43
12:50 14:13
13:25 14:48
13:55 15:18
14:25 15:48
14:45 16:08
15:05 16:28
15:25 16:48
15:45 17:08
16:00 17:23
16:15 17:38
16:30 17:53
16:50 18:13
17:05 18:28
17:20 18:43
17:38 19:01
18:00 19:23
18:20 19:43
18:40 20:03
19:05 20:28
19:25 20:48
19:45 21:08
20:05 21:28
20:20 21:43
20:35 21:58
20:55 22:18
21:10 22:33
21:25 22:48
21:45 23:08
22:05 23:28
22:20 23:43
22:40 00:03
23:00 00:23
23:30 00:53

Download PDF Bus 84

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 84 Bus Timings.## 84 Bus Route Landmarks

Traveling on the 84 bus route offers a glimpse into some of Dubai’s key landmarks, here are some key stops or landmarks along the way

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  • Jumeirah Beach Residence Station 2: Starting point near the beautiful JBR beach, known for its vibrant atmosphere and beachfront properties.
  • Mina Al Siyahi, Le Meridien Hotel: A stop close to luxury hotels and the iconic Dubai Marina.
  • Dubai Media City: A hub for media and tech companies, showcasing Dubai’s modern infrastructure.
  • Dubai Internet City: Another significant business district hosting numerous tech firms.
  • The Mall of the Emirates: One of Dubai’s largest shopping malls, famous for its indoor ski slope.
  • Al Barsha Heights: A bustling residential area with various hotels and dining options.
  • Al Quoz Industrial Area: Home to numerous businesses and warehouses, reflecting the industrial side of Dubai.
  • Quoz, Al Khail Gate 1: The final stop, a residential area providing housing for many of Dubai’s workforce.

Along its journey, it covers approximately 23.64 kilometers, stopping at 40 different points.

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the C26, which runs from Wasl Park Terminus to Qusais Industrial Area, Terminus, and the 28, which travels from The Dubai Mall to Oud Metha Bus Station.## Journey Experience

Starting at JBR, famous for its stunning views, upscale dining, and attractions like The Walk and The Beach, the route offers a glimpse of Dubai’s coastal lifestyle.

The journey ends at Al Khail Gate, a busy residential community that reflects Dubai’s more everyday, local life.

  • Nol Card: Ensure you have a Nol card, which is required for all public transportation in Dubai. You can recharge it at various stations and retail outlets.
  • App Assistance: Use apps like Moovit for real-time tracking and updates on bus schedules and routes.
  • Exploration: Take advantage of the various stops to explore different parts of the city, from luxury hotels and shopping malls to business districts and residential areas.

Read Also: J01 Bus Timings and Route ## Conclusion

Riding the 84 bus not only provides a practical means of transportation but also offers a window into the diverse and dynamic city of Dubai. Whether you’re a resident or a visitor, this route is a great way to navigate and experience the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: August 29, 2025.
